instruction.title: Prepare the filling:
steps: Heat oil in a pan on medium heat. Add mustard seeds and cumin seeds; let them splutter.
Add chopped green chilies and grated ginger; sauté for 1 minute.
Add turmeric, red chili powder, and salt. Mix well.
Add the mashed potatoes, garam masala, and chaat masala. Mix thoroughly.
Cook for 2-3 minutes to blend flavors. Add chopped coriander, mix, and remove from heat. Let it cool.

instruction.title: Prepare the batter:
steps: In a bowl, combine gram flour, turmeric, chili powder, asafoetida, and salt.
Gradually add water and whisk to a smooth, thick batter — consistency should be like pancake batter but slightly thicker.

instruction.title: Assemble the Pakodas:
steps: Take a bread slice, cut off the edges if desired.
Spread a generous amount of potato filling on one slice, then cover with another slice (like a sandwich).
Press lightly to seal the edges.

instruction.title: Fry:
steps: Heat oil in a deep pan on medium heat.
Dip the stuffed bread sandwich into the gram flour batter, coat evenly.
Carefully drop it into hot oil. Fry on medium heat until golden brown and crisp on both sides.
Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.

instruction.title: Serve:
steps: Serve hot with green chutney and tamarind chutney or ketchup.
